name: AI AppSec Index
description: The definitive open-source reference index for AI-Augmented Application Security covering AI remediation quality benchmarking, ASPM capability mapping, AI-generated code vulnerability tracking, regulatory compliance mapping, and false positive rate datasets.

distribution.name: remediation-leaderboard
distribution.description: AI fix quality scores for 9 remediation engines

distribution.name: aspm-capability-matrix
distribution.description: ASPM vendor capability mapping for 10+ vendors

distribution.name: ai-code-vulnerabilities
distribution.description: CWE patterns in AI-generated code with 12 tracked patterns

distribution.name: compliance-map
distribution.description: Regulatory compliance requirements mapped to AppSec tooling

distribution.name: false-positive-rates
distribution.description: False positive rates by tool, language, and vulnerability class
